name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "

---

## Problem / Use Case
What problem does this solve? What's the use case?

## Proposed Solution
How should it work? What would the CLI command or output look like?

## Alternatives Considered
Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context
Anything else — screenshots, links, related issues.
